title: The National | Newborn found dead in Halifax
full_text:
The National | Newborn found dead in Halifax
May 24, 2026 | Two people face charges after a newborn was found dead in the woods in Halifax after the child’s mother showed up in hospital in life-threatening condition. The U.S. ambassador says Canadians should expect tariffs to stick around. And, David Suzuki has a warning about President Donald Trump.
